title: Sculk Patch Feature
description: Generates a sculk patch in the world with configurable growth and spread parameters.

sculk_patch_feature_definition.title: Sculk Patch Feature Definition
sculk_patch_feature_definition.description: A single Sculk Patch Feature Definition.

identifier.description: The identifier for this feature. The identifier must include a namespace and must match the filename.

can_place_sculk_patch_on.description: Optional. Blocks that the sculk patch can be placed on.

central_block.description: Optional. The central block type for the sculk patch.

central_block_placement_chance.description: Optional. Probability of placing the central block.

cursor_count.description: Number of cursors for sculk spreading.

charge_amount.description: Amount of charge for sculk growth.

spread_attempts.description: Number of spread attempts per round.

extra_growth_chance.description: Optional. Range for extra growth chance.
